category_sources: source_facts.description: directly patch container images from vulnerability scanning results; official Project Copacetic GitHub/org describes direct container patching to minimize time to mitigation
display_name_sources: Official Copacetic repository describes `copa` as the CLI tool at https://github.com/project-copacetic/copacetic; source_facts.name is copa
docs_sources: Official repository README points users to full documentation at https://project-copacetic.github.io/copacetic/
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/project-copacetic/copacetic; per instruction, repo returned as null and not re-evaluated
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions container image patching and vulnerability scan results; official repository says Copa patches container images without full rebuilds and uses scanners like Trivy
